note: Evening pass — additional leads found from expanded source searches. DB write deferred (Neon not reachable from sandbox).

leads.name: Nexus
leads.notes: Brussels/SF enterprise AI agent platform. Just raised $4.3M seed led by General Catalyst + YC. Early customers include Orange Group and Proximus. Founded by ex-McKinsey consultant Assem Chammah and AI engineer Shady Al Shoha. Could need AI consulting/strategy support as they scale, OR could be a referral partner for Katie's AI consulting pipeline. Post-seed growth stage = likely hiring, building brand.

leads.name: Treeline
leads.notes: AI-first IT operating system replacing managed services firms. $25M Series A led by a16z (March 31, 2026). CEO Peter Doyle ex-Accel. Claims 98% agent resolution rate. Post-Series A = hiring, scaling, likely needs PR/marketing to build brand awareness in enterprise IT buyer market.

leads.name: Confido Legal
leads.source: Web Search — LawSites, PR Newswire, FintechGlobal
leads.notes: Embedded legal payments platform serving 1,500+ law firms. Raised $9M across 2 rounds led by Aquiline Capital Partners + LegalTech Fund. Expanding disbursements product. As a legal-adjacent fintech scaling across US/Canada, they may need legal ops consulting for compliance frameworks, partnership agreements, regulatory navigation.

leads.name: Antidote
leads.source: Web Search — LawSites, Artificial Lawyer, Tech.eu
leads.notes: AI billing compliance for law firms. $5M seed led by Lakestar (Jan 2026). Founded by Nicholas d'Adhemar (prev CEO of Apperio). Actively expanding into US market — may need legal consulting for US regulatory landscape, partnership structures, compliance advisory as they onboard US law firm clients.

leads.name: Soxton AI
leads.source: Web Search — BusinessWire, Fortune, Artificial Lawyer
leads.notes: AI-native law firm for startups. $2.5M pre-seed from Moxxie Ventures. Founded by Logan Brown (Harvard JD, ex-Cooley). Already serving 270+ businesses. Recently acquired Cipher Technologies (March 2026). Growing fast, likely needs legal ops consulting for their own corporate structure, compliance frameworks, and advisory support as they scale. Also a potential referral partner for fund formation clients.

leads.name: Vestwell
leads.notes: Digital savings fintech with $200M+ ARR, 2M+ savers, $50B administered. Just raised $385M Series E (Feb 2026) at $2B valuation. CEO Aaron Schumm. Classic PR/marketing fit: major fintech in growth mode, post-raise visibility needs, B2B enterprise sales motion. Likely expanding marketing/comms team post-raise.

leads.name: Rain
leads.source: Web Search — Crunchbase News, PR Newswire
leads.notes: Stablecoin-powered payments infrastructure. $250M Series C (Jan 2026) led by ICONIQ at $1.95B. Partners include Western Union, Nuvei. 30x card base growth, 38x payment volume growth. Expanding globally across 5 continents. Classic financial services B2B in hypergrowth — strong PR/marketing candidate for brand positioning, enterprise trust-building, and market education.

leads.name: Mastra
leads.source: Web Search — Mastra Blog, YC, Spark Capital
leads.notes: Open-source JS SDK for building AI agents, from the Gatsby team. $22M Series A (April 9, 2026) led by Spark Capital. Building agent development platform. As an AI infra company, could be a partner/referral for Katie's AI consulting clients, or may need media/podcast visibility to build developer community.

leads.name: Noon
leads.source: Web Search — FinSMEs, SaaS News, VentureBurn
leads.notes: AI design platform from codebase. $44M seed (April 1, 2026) — one of largest design tech seeds ever. Co-founded by Aditya Bandi and Kushagra Sinha. Angel investors include design leaders from Stripe, OpenAI, Meta. Post-massive-seed = building brand, needs PR to establish market category. B2B enterprise/mid-market target.

leads.name: Shakti VC
leads.location: San Francisco, CA / New York, NY
leads.source: Web Search — Venture Capital Journal Rising Stars 2026, PitchBook
leads.notes: Early-stage VC fund investing in AI-driven consumer behavior transformation. Founded 2020, SF/NYC. Featured as emerging manager in VCJ 2026 Rising Stars. 43 investments to date. Pre-seed to Series A focus. As emerging manager recognized by VCJ, may be raising subsequent fund or expanding — potential fund formation legal client.
